title: Implementation Plan for Explore typed intake artifact flow

ownership.concurrencyNotes: Plan skill consumes only persisted Work Brief carriers through the I-05B/I-05A plan-intake seam; build and ship remain downstream.
ownership.handoffPolicy: Implementation Plan artifacts require independent validation before downstream build intake.

objective: The brainstorm producer writes a validator-accepted Work Brief through the common writer.
scope: Exploratory work can otherwise remain trapped in chat history.
The brainstorm producer writes a validator-accepted Work Brief through the common writer.
nonScope: Do not produce an Implementation Plan

implementationSteps.description: Consume Work Brief work-brief-brainstorm-producer-fixture through plan intake and preserve typed artifact handoff.
Implement the approved scope: The brainstorm producer writes a validator-accepted Work Brief through the common writer.
Execute all required Verification Delta layers or keep the plan blocked with explicit unblock metadata.

expectedTouchedAreas.reason: Verification evidence must be captured as durable artifacts or command logs.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Produced brainstorm Work Brief validates through the artifacts package
Plan intake consumes the produced Work Brief only after it is persisted

definitionOfDone.description: Implementation Plan and embedded Verification Delta validate through the public @vibe-engineer/artifacts validator before and after persistence.
All 16 Verification Delta catalog layers are present with required evidence expectations.
An independent validator must inspect the changed files and real producer→consumer seams.

advisoryReviewItems: Independent validation must classify deterministic blockers before any advisory review can be treated as closure.
rerunHints: Re-run public artifact validation after every plan or carrier mutation.

workDecompositionHints: Keep implementation work packages within the validated orchestration size bound.
parallelismHints: Parallel work is allowed only across disjoint owned paths and after dependency gates pass.
docsContextUpdatesExpected: Update context or handoff artifacts only when owned by the executing lane.

approval.notes: Approved by plan skill because no blocking Verification Delta item or open blocker remains.

reviewNotes: Plan is ready for independent validation and downstream build intake.
